MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-04-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MYEISHA EDWARDS' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED IN PART & GRANTED IN PART THE APPLICATION. THE COURT GRANTED THE WAIVER AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO WAIVER OF COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER FEES FOR A WITNESS, FEES FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT AND FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
